settingsIntro: Hanji is sustained by its sponsors. The sign-in screen shows a small banner with the current top five sponsors.
rule1: The banner shows the top five sponsors by remaining balance.
rule2: Once a month, every displayed sponsor's balance is reduced by what the fifth-place sponsor has, so all five displayed sponsors pay the same fair rate.
rule3: When a balance runs out, the slot passes to the next sponsor by balance.
rule4: Keeping the banner enabled by default is what grants Hanji's license exception; a closed, banner-free version needs a separate commercial license.
emptySlot: Open slot — sponsor to appear here
builtWithIntro: Hanji was built with the help of these tools and platforms.
